title: seridia pullata
intro: Seridia pullata, also known as the False Strychnos, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a stimulant and astringent, as well as its use in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Seridia pullata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatism, and even treat some forms of malaria. Traditionally, Seridia pullata is prepared as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to create remedies for a variety of ailments.
